719.reason: [This consumes tokens during lookahead without proper rollback mechanism. The parseExp() call advances the parser state deeply, and simply restoring 'index' and 'token' is insufficient because nested parsing functions may have consumed multiple tokens and the internal state of those parsers isn't restored]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This consumes tokens during lookahead without proper rollback mechanism. The parseExp() call advances the parser state deeply, and simply restoring 'index' and 'token' is insufficient because nested parsing functions may have consumed multiple tokens and the internal state of those parsers isn't restored]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This consumes arbitrary number of tokens during lookahead without proper bounds checking, and the parser state restoration may be incomplete because parseExp() can consume multiple tokens but we only save/restore the initial index]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [This consumes tokens during lookahead without proper bounds checking and may advance the parser state beyond recovery point, causing incorrect parsing and error reporting]
